faq_description: Find answers to common questions or contact us directly.
faq_create_invitation: How do I create a new invitation?
faq_create_answer: You can create a new invitation by clicking the (+) button in the bottom menu, then choosing the venue and setting the time and number of guests.
faq_free_answer: Yes, the app is free for basic use. You can subscribe to premium plans for additional features.
faq_delete_account: How do I delete my account?
faq_delete_answer: You can delete your account from the settings page in your profile, or contact technical support.
faq_reputation_answer: Reputation points are a measure of your credibility in the app. They increase when you commit to invitations and others rate you positively, and decrease with frequent absences.
info_we_collect_text: We collect information you provide when registering (name, email, photo). We also collect location data to help find nearby venues and partners.
improve_experience: To improve your app experience and personalize suggestions.
communicate: To communicate with you about account updates or important notifications.
prevent_fraud: To prevent fraud and ensure platform security.
sharing_info_text: We do not sell your personal data to any third party. We may share some general data (without identity) with partners to improve services.
data_security_text: We use modern encryption technologies to protect your data. However, no security system is 100% secure.
your_rights_text: You have the right to request modification or deletion of your data at any time through app settings or by contacting technical support.

account_responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.
accurate_info: Registered information must be accurate and correct.
suspend_account: Management reserves the right to suspend any account that violates ethical standards.
user_conduct_text: Using the app for any illegal or abusive purposes is prohibited. All members must be respected and no spam messages or fake invitations should be sent.
intellectual_property_text: All rights to design, logos, and content are owned by DineBuddies app and may not be copied or used without permission.
liability_limitation_text: The app provides a platform for individuals to communicate and coordinate meetings. We are not responsible for service or food quality at venues or individuals' actions outside the app.

faq.title: Help & Support
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions and learn how to get the most out of DineBuddies.

user_questions.a: The ultimate platform for food lovers! DineBuddies is an innovative social app blending fine dining discovery, meeting new people through curated food invitations, and building genuine tabletop communities.

user_questions.q: How do I create an invitation and split the bill?
user_questions.a: Tap the (+) button, select a restaurant, and set your date & time. In the settings, you can choose if the bill is 'On the Host', 'Split Equally', or 'Everyone pays for themselves'.

user_questions.q: What's the difference between Public, Private, and Dating invitations?
user_questions.a:
• Public: Visible on the main map for anyone to request joining.
• Private: A hidden invitation sent exclusively via an elegant e-invite link to specific people.
• Dating: Specially curated romantic encounters requiring a Premium subscription, featuring advanced filters and trusted reviews.

user_questions.q: How do I accept join requests for my invitation?
user_questions.a: When someone requests to join, you receive an instant notification. Open the invitation details, review their profile, and tap 'Accept' or 'Decline'. Once accepted, a private group chat automatically unlocks.

Every restaurant on the app has its own 'Community'. By joining a restaurant's community, you enter a public chat room with the staff and other patrons to ask about dishes, share recommendations, and catch exclusive offers.

user_questions.q: How do I level up my account and earn Reputation Points?
user_questions.a: Reputation Points show your reliability! They increase when you attend events on time and receive 5-star ratings from hosts or guests. Points drop if you no-show or receive complaints.

user_questions.q: How do I upgrade to Premium (VIP)?
user_questions.a: Navigate to your Profile > Settings > Subscriptions. The VIP tier grants you exceptional search filters, full access to Dating invitations, profile visitor insights, and unlimited private invites.

user_questions.q: How do I permanently delete my account?
user_questions.a: Go to Profile > Settings > Account > Delete Account. Please note that this action is permanent and data cannot be restored after 30 days.

user_questions.q: How do I filter restaurants and cafes?
user_questions.a: Use the search bar and filter toggles to sort by Restaurants, Cafes, currently Open venues, or rank them by Highest Rating and closest Distance.
Instead of waiting for app users, create a 'Private' invitation, copy its elegant electronic card link, and share it via WhatsApp! Anyone clicking the link is seamlessly guided to RSVP with you.

business_questions.q: What is the Business Pro Dashboard?
business_questions.a: A tailored, professional control center for DineBuddies restaurant partners. It gives you full control over your Menu, operating hours, direct chats, and broadcasting marketing posts across the platform.

business_questions.q: How do I publish a Featured promotional post?
business_questions.a: From the Pro Dashboard, navigate to 'Featured Posts', upload your promotional image, and write a caption. Your post will instantly appear to all users in the main app feed.

business_questions.q: How do I broadcast offers to my community?
business_questions.a: Every user who joins your 'Community' shows up in your Members tab. You can drop massive discounts directly into the 'Community Chat' to instantly drive traffic during off-peak hours.

business_questions.q: How do I manage my digital Menu?
business_questions.a: Under 'Menu & Services' in your dashboard, upload dishes with mouth-watering photos and pricing. The sleek digital menu updates instantly for all profile visitors.

business_questions.q: What is the difference between Professional and Elite Partner tiers?
business_questions.a: The 'Pro' tier sets up your storefront and directory listing. The 'Elite' tier is our powerhouse package, supercharging your algorithm ranking and granting unlimited, priority Featured Slides for maximum visibility.

business_questions.q: How do I handle Customer Reviews?
business_questions.a: The 'Reviews' tab provides deep analytical breakdowns of your ratings. You also have the power to officially reply to reviews under your restaurant’s verified name to build lasting customer loyalty.

seo.title: DineBuddies | Premium Social Dining & Exclusive Food Network
seo.description: DineBuddies is an exclusive social dining network where food lovers meet, join private restaurant invitations, and connect over premium meals.

In Google Cloud Console: enable the legacy Places API (not only Places API New) for this project, add your site under HTTP referrer restrictions on the key, and ensure billing is active. The in-app search uses the classic Maps JavaScript Places library.

smart_bio_disclaimer_ai: Options below control which details are sent to the AI. The button requests 10 short headlines from the server (OpenAI); no key is stored in the app.
smart_bio_suggestions_hint: Tap a line to use it as your message (you can edit it after).
suggest_messages_failed: Could not load suggestions. Try again in a moment.
suggest_messages_not_configured: Message suggestions are not configured on the server (missing API key).
suggest_messages_internal: The AI suggestion service failed (often an OpenAI key, quota, or model issue on the server). Try again later or write the message yourself.
suggest_messages_invalid_context: Add a title and location so we can suggest a message.
content_unsafe: Sorry, the file content is inappropriate and violates community guidelines.
failed_generate_bio: Could not build description from your details.
business_cannot_create_invitation: Business accounts cannot create or publish invitations.
business_contact_email_hint: This is usually the same email you used to register — signup requires email and password. You can edit it if your public contact should be different.
business_email_verify_banner_desc: Your business works in the app, but it stays hidden from the Partners page and public discovery until you verify your email. Changing your email requires verifying the new address.
business_email_verify_banner_title: Verify your email to appear publicly
business_login_after_email_verify: Email verified. Sign in with your business email and password.
business_hours_imported: Opening hours loaded from Google. You can edit them later on your profile.
business_profile_not_public_until_email: This page is not shown to the public until the business verifies their email. The owner can still open and edit their profile from the business dashboard.
business_publish_need_verify_desc: After you verify, you can publish your profile below or hide it anytime (e.g. vacation).
business_publish_verify_email_first: Verify your email before publishing to the Partners page.
business_signup_failed_generic: Failed to create business account. Please try again.
business_signup_verify_toast: We sent an activation link to your email. Check your inbox to verify your business account.
business_signup_verify_email_failed: Account created, but we could not send the activation email. Use “Resend” in the banner at the top of your profile.
business_signup_photos_upload_failed: Could not upload selected photos. Check your connection and try again.
business_signup_photos_partial: Some photos could not be uploaded; the rest were saved to your profile.
business_signup_permission_denied: Could not save your business profile (access denied). If you already use this email as a personal account, sign out and register the business with a new email.
business_signup_requires_new_account: A business profile must use its own registration. Sign out first to create a business account with a different email.
business_signup_sign_out_first_title: Sign out to create a business
business_verify_reminder_inline: We sent a verification link to your email. You can finish this form now; verify when ready to appear publicly.
business_verify_signin_body: Sign in with the password you created to continue setting up your business profile.
cannot_remove_age_group: Cannot remove a previously selected age group. You can only add more.
cannot_remove_gender_group: Cannot remove a previously selected group. You can only add more.
city_auto_detected: City (detected from your location — you can only register in this city)
city_from_google_only: Only cities that exist on Google Maps can be selected.
clipboard_error: Cannot read clipboard. Please paste manually.
code_backup_desc: Create restore points for your codebase and revert changes instantly.
complete_profile_desc: Please provide a few details to get the best experience.
dating_invitation_preference_desc: Control whether others can send you dating invitations.
dating_invite_disabled_by_user: This person has disabled receiving dating invitations.
dating_one_person_selected: Your date is selected. Remove to choose someone else.
draft_modal_description: Don't worry, we've safely saved everything you did as a draft so your work isn't lost. Take your time, and once you join as a partner your new look will be published instantly for your customers!
draft_modal_title: Your profile is starting to look amazing! ✨
enable_push_desc: Get instant updates for new messages, invitations, and bookings.
engagement_tooltip: Likes and comments on your community posts
error_saving_profile: Error saving profile. Please try again.
failed_save_draft: Could not save draft. Try again, or sign in with a personal account (business accounts cannot create public invitations).
for_unregistered_venues: For venues not yet on DineBuddies
ios_push_desc: To receive notifications on iPhone, tap the Share icon below and select "Add to Home Screen".
like_failed: Could not update like. Try again.
no_members_yet: No members yet. Share your community to grow.
notifications_failed: Failed to enable notifications. Permission might have been denied.
post_failed: Failed to create post. Try again.
push_enable_failed: Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
push_enabled_success: Push notifications enabled for this device.
rankings_no_in_scope: No businesses in this area. Try Global.
save_then_share: Save then share on WhatsApp / Instagram
search_place_placeholder: Search for restaurants, cafes, or venues near you
location_no_results: No places found. Try another search.
share_limit_recipient: You have already shared this item with the same recipient today.
share_limit_total: You have reached the maximum (3 times) for sharing this item today.
sign_out_failed: Could not sign out. Try again.
unpublished_business_reminder_desc: Please publish it from your dashboard so customers can find you.
unpublished_business_reminder_title: Your business is currently unpublished or hidden
warning_permanent_demographics_short: Gender and age category cannot be changed after saving.
business_address_same_city: Business address must be in {{city}}. You are registering from this city only.
location_detection_failed: We could not detect your city. Please enable location access or try again.
media_upload_failed: Failed to upload media. Try again.
name: Name
please_fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields
please_invite_at_least_one_guest: Please invite at least one guest for a private invitation
please_invite_one_person: Please invite someone for your date
publish_permission_denied: Publishing failed: your account does not have permission to update this invitation.
Elite_Plan_Features: Permanent showcase slot • Unlimited display time • Advanced priority
Pro_Business_Plan_Features: One showcase slot × 50 hours/week • Buy extra hours when needed
create_account_enjoy: Create an account to enjoy all features
failed_share_story: Failed to share story. Try again.
failed_update_status: Failed to update status. Please try again.
guests_no_story: Guests cannot post stories. Please sign in.
login_to_create: Sign in to create an invitation
notif_msg_booking_cancelled: A booking at your venue was cancelled.
notif_msg_booking_confirmed: A booking at your venue was confirmed.
notif_msg_completed: The invitation is complete. We hope you had a great time!
notif_msg_message: You have a new message from {{name}}
notif_msg_reminder: Your invitation is coming up soon
notif_msg_request_approved: Your request to join was approved
notif_msg_updated: The invitation time was updated. Please confirm your attendance again.
only_image_stories: Only images are supported for stories.
